SAIL_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
 
save(Game) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.controller.persistence.SavedGameRepository
Writes both the serialized game and the plain-text summary, overwriting any previous save.
SAVE_DIRECTORY - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.persistence.SavedGameRepository
 
SavedGameRepository - Class in com.example.battleship.controller.persistence
Persists a Game to disk (HU-5), split across two files: saved-game.ser -- the whole Game object, written with plain Java serialization.
SavedGameRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.persistence.SavedGameRepository

SEGMENTS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
 
SegmentState - Enum Class in com.example.battleship
Visual state of an individual segment (cell) of a ship.
SegmentState() - Constructor for enum class com.example.battleship.SegmentState
 
selectedPosition - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
The cell picked on the first click, waiting for a second click on the same cell to confirm.
SEQUENCE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.KonamiCodeDetector
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Cell
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in record class com.example.battleship.model.board.Position
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HumanPlayer
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.MachinePlayer
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.Player
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.RandomShootingStrategy
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
 
setElevation(double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
Sets the public, intuitive elevation (0 = level, 90 = overhead) and applies it to the rotate transform with the sign it actually needs: with this rig's order (rotate around X, then push the camera back along Z), a POSITIVE angle rotates the camera DOWN below the target instead of up above it, so the transform always gets -degrees, never the raw value.
setHullVisible(boolean) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
Shows or hides just this ship's hull -- not the whole node, so hit markers (Ship3D.markHit(int)) stay visible even while the hull itself is hidden.
setNickname(String) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.Player
 
setOccupyingShip(Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Cell
Records which ship occupies this cell.
setPaneVisible(Node, boolean) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
setState(CellState) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Cell
Updates this cell's state.
setTurn(BattlefieldView3D.Turn) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Glides the camera from whichever dome it's currently over to the other board's dome.
setupCamera() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
Builds and installs a fixed, tilted-down camera framing the whole board -- see the rig comments below for why it's built this way.
setupLights() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
Adds a soft ambient fill light plus one point light, so the board's shapes read with visible shading instead of flat silhouettes.
setupLights(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
shift(Orientation, int) - Method in record class com.example.battleship.model.board.Position
Returns the position one cell away from this one in the given orientation, used while laying out a ship's occupied cells.
Ship - Class in com.example.battleship.model.ship
A ship placed on a Board: a type, a starting Position, an Orientation, and per-segment hit tracking.
Ship(ShipType, Position, Orientation) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
 
SHIP - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.board.CellState
Occupied by part of a ship that hasn't been shot at.
Ship3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.ships
3D representation of a fleet ship, built from JavaFX Shape3D subclasses (Box, Cylinder, Sphere).
Ship3D(int, int, int, Orientation) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
shipCenterX() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
X offset of the midpoint of the whole ship, useful to center a full-length hull piece.
shipDisplayName(ShipType) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
ShipFactory - Class in com.example.battleship.model.ship
Creates Ship instances and the list of ship types a complete fleet is made of.
ShipFactory() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipFactory
 
ShipFactory3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.ships
Factory for 3D ships.
ShipFactory3D() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.ships.ShipFactory3D
 
ShipPlacementAdapter - Class in com.example.battleship.controller.event
No-op default implementation of ShipPlacementListener.
ShipPlacementAdapter() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.event.ShipPlacementAdapter
 
ShipPlacementController - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
Handles HU-1: letting the human player place their fleet manually, one ship at a time, by clicking a cell on their own board.
ShipPlacementController(Board, Group) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
ShipPlacementController.RotateKeyHandler - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
Toggles ShipPlacementController.currentOrientation on the "R" key and refreshes the preview ghost so the rotation is immediately visible -- a private inner class (rather than a lambda) so the rotate behavior reads as a named, self-contained unit of keyboard handling.
ShipPlacementListener - Interface in com.example.battleship.controller.event
Receives notifications about the fleet-placement phase (HU-1).
ships - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
 
ShipType - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.model.ship
The four kinds of ship in a fleet, each with a fixed size (number of cells it occupies) and a fixed count per player, as specified by the project statement: 1 aircraft carrier, 4 cells 2 submarines, 3 cells each 3 destroyers, 2 cells each 4 frigates, 1 cell each A full fleet therefore occupies 20 cells in total.
ShipType(int, int) - Constructor for enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipType
 
shipViews - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
shootingStrategy - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.MachinePlayer
 
ShootingStrategy - Interface in com.example.battleship.model.player
Decides where the machine player shoots next.
ShotMark3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.assets
Builds the 3D marks placed on a cell after a shot.
ShotMark3D() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.assets.ShotMark3D
 
ShotOutcome(Position, ShotResult) - Constructor for record class com.example.battleship.model.Game.ShotOutcome
Creates an instance of a ShotOutcome record class.
ShotResult - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.model.player
The outcome of resolving a single shot against a Board.
ShotResult() - Constructor for enum class com.example.battleship.model.player.ShotResult
 
showGameOver(Player) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
size - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec
The field for the size record component.
size() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec
Returns the value of the size record component.
SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
Both dimensions of the board: 10x10.
sizeInCells - Variable in enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipType
 
sizeInCells - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
SKY_HORIZON - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
SKY_TOP - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
SKY_WALL_HEIGHT - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
SMOKE_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
 
standard() - Static method in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
Letters past row 10, numbers past column J, letters read J..A -- the confirmed machine-board layout.
start() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Starts a new game: hands input over to fleet placement, and starts listening for the Konami Code (HU-3) for the whole rest of the game.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.battleship.DemoBattlefield3D
 
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.battleship.DemoShapes3D
 
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.battleship.Main
 
START_MENU - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.controller.GamePhase
Title, nickname field, "New Game"/"Continue" buttons.
startCombatPhase() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
startCombatPhase() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Called once the human's fleet is fully placed: auto-places the machine's fleet (HU-4), mirrors it into CombatController, and hands input over to it.
startMenuHintLabel - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
startMenuPane - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
startPlacementPhase(String) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController

states - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
STRIPE_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
SUBMARINE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipType
2 per fleet, 3 cells each.
Submarine3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.ships
Submarine: occupies 3 cells.
Submarine3D(int, int, Orientation) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
 
SUMMARY_FILE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.persistence.SavedGameRepository
 
SUNK - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.board.CellState
Part of a ship whose every cell has now been hit -- the whole ship is destroyed.
SUNK - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.player.ShotResult
The shot destroyed the last remaining cell of a ship; the shooter fires again (unless the fleet is now fully sunk).
SUNK - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.SegmentState
The segment (and the whole ship) has been sunk.
sunkMaterial() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
